Security Report

«Important

If this report contains a real security vulnerability that could put users at risk, do not submit it as a public GitHub issue.

Instead, follow the instructions in SECURITY.md and report it privately.»

Thank you for helping improve the security of Dearog Password Manager.

Summary

Provide a short summary of the security concern.

---

Select the category that best describes the issue.

Description

Describe the security concern.

Include enough information for maintainers to understand the issue.

---

Impact

Explain the potential impact.

Examples:

- Unauthorized access
- Sensitive data exposure
- Authentication bypass
- Data corruption
- Privacy issue
- Information disclosure

If appropriate and safe to share privately, describe how the issue can be reproduced.

Device Model

Evidence

Attach any relevant information if appropriate:

- Screenshots
- Error messages
- Stack traces
- Logs (after removing sensitive information)

Never include:

- Passwords
- Vault contents
- Recovery codes
- API keys
- Private encryption keys
- Personal information

---

Severity

Choose the estimated severity.

- [ ] Low
- [ ] Medium
- [ ] High
- [ ] Critical

---

Additional Information

Provide any additional context that may help investigate the report.

---

Checklist

- [ ] I have reviewed SECURITY.md.
- [ ] I have removed all sensitive information from this report.
- [ ] I understand that critical vulnerabilities should be reported privately.
- [ ] I have searched for existing reports before creating this issue.

Thank you for helping keep Dearog Password Manager secure.
